stories.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI，指控其窃取硬件机密
stories.sourceTitle: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.summary: Apple 对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，称前 Apple 员工在加入 OpenAI 后窃取了其硬件商业机密，以加速 OpenAI 的硬件计划。
stories.analysis: 这起诉讼可能加剧两家科技巨头在AI硬件领域的竞争。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." In addition t

stories.title: Meta 在用户强烈反对后移除 Instagram 争议性 AI 功能
stories.sourceTitle: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.summary: Meta 向 Puck News 证实，在用户群体反弹后，已撤下该功能。
stories.analysis: 用户对AI功能的接受度仍是平台需要权衡的关键。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Meta told Dylan Byers, of Puck News, that it had nixed the feature after backlash from its user base.

stories.title: Instagram 负责人 Mosseri：不喜欢 AI 内容就不要让它出现在你的信息流中
stories.sourceTitle: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.summary: Mosseri 在采访中表示，平台不应过滤 AI 内容，但用户有权选择不看。
stories.analysis: 这反映了社交平台对于AI内容审核的审慎态度，将选择权交给用户。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. "I don't think we should filter out AI content," Mosseri said during an interview on Lenny Rachi

stories.title: Sunrun 启动家用AI数据中心试点：付钱给用户在家放计算单元
stories.sourceTitle: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.summary: Sunrun 推出“分布式AI计算”试点，向用户支付费用，将计算单元放置在他们家中，以构建分散的AI算力网络。
stories.analysis: 分布式AI数据中心概念可能改变算力部署模式，但隐私和能耗是潜在挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new "distributed AI compute" pro

stories.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI 涉嫌商业机密窃取，指控涉及高管指使
stories.sourceTitle: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.summary: Apple 指控 OpenAI 高层（包括一位长期前员工）指示了窃取行为。
stories.analysis: 与前述诉讼为同一事件，TechCrunch 补充了高层指使的细节。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

stories.title: Hugging Face CEO：开源AI比以往任何时候都重要
stories.sourceTitle: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue 表示，开源AI正在蓬勃发展，其平台已类似AI领域的GitHub，约半数财富500强企业正在使用。
stories.analysis: 开源AI在企业和开发者中的采用率持续上升，商业闭源模型面临竞争压力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Dela

stories.title: SK Hynix 创美国史上最大外国IPO，融资265亿美元，被敦促在美建厂
stories.sourceTitle: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.summary: SK Hynix 通过美国IPO融资265亿美元，创外国公司IPO最高纪录。美国方面敦促其和三星在美国新建芯片工厂。
stories.analysis: AI芯片需求推动半导体巨头扩大美国产能，地缘政治因素加剧。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

stories.title: 德意志电信与OpenAI合作，用AI重塑电信服务
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: 德意志电信正通过与OpenAI合作，在客户服务、员工工作流、网络运营和语音交互方面全面融入AI，成为AI原生电信公司。
stories.analysis: 大型电信运营商加速AI化，可能推动行业服务体验和运营效率的大幅提升。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: Hugging Face CEO：企业已厌倦“租用”AI，转向开源模式
stories.sourceTitle: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
stories.summary: Clem Delangue 认为，企业不再满足于租用闭源AI，转而拥抱开源模型以获取更多控制权和灵活性。
stories.analysis: 开源AI的吸引力在于降低依赖和成本，闭源供应商需重新思考商业模式。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Dela

stories.title: 微软2025年碳排放增加25%，AI扩张加剧环境压力
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.summary: 微软最新可持续发展报告显示，其2025年碳排放总量为3400万公吨，同比上升25%，这与其AI业务扩张和基础设施建设有关。
stories.analysis: AI发展与环境目标的矛盾日益突出，科技公司需要更大力度的减排措施。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric to

stories.title: OpenAI AGI负责人Fidji Simo因健康原因离职，转任兼职顾问
stories.sourceTitle: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.summary: Fidji Simo在X上宣布，因疾病将离开AGI负责人的全职岗位，转为兼职顾问。她此前在4月已因医疗休假。
stories.analysis: AGI团队领导变动可能影响OpenAI长期技术路线节奏。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a

stories.title: Google 新增广告AI标签：用户可查看广告是否由AI制作
stories.sourceTitle: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
stories.summary: Google于周四宣布，在“我的广告中心”中为搜索、发现和YouTube上的广告添加“已由AI创建或编辑”标签，提升透明度。
stories.analysis: AI生成内容标识成为行业趋势，有助于用户辨别和信任管理。
stories.sourceExcerpt: You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch. The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under t

stories.title: 微软利用AI扩大补丁星期二更新量，安全修复更全面
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
stories.summary: 微软在博客中表示，将使用AI更早发现潜在安全问题，因此Windows 11更新中将包含更多安全补丁。
stories.analysis: AI辅助安全运维可提高漏洞发现效率，但用户需应对更大的更新包。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Windows 11 updates could soon include fixes for more security issues at once. Microsoft said in a blog post on Thursday that it's now using AI to "identify potential issues earlier," which means "customers will see a higher volume of security updates included

stories.title: OpenAI 与基金会合作，为K-12教师提供AI实操技能培训
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: OpenAI Academy 和 Walton Family Foundation 推出AI Skills Jams，帮助K-12教师掌握实用的AI课堂教学技能。
stories.analysis: AI教育向下渗透，教师AI素养培养成为重点。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与OpenAI合作，打造AI原生组织
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG（三菱日联金融集团）正利用ChatGPT Enterprise构建AI原生组织，优化内部工作流并推出新的AI金融服务。
stories.analysis: 大型金融机构全面拥抱AI，从试点走向系统化转型。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 工程师利用 core dump 分析，修复了一个存在18年的软件bug
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI 工程师通过大规模 core dump 分析调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，最终找出硬件故障和一个18年的软件bug并修复。
stories.analysis: AI基础设施的可靠性提升依赖于深度调试，长期隐蔽bug的发现展示了专业能力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: OpenAI 发布 GeneBench-Pro，评估AI在基因组学与科研中的能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: GeneBench-Pro 是一个新的基准测试，使用真实复杂数据集评估AI在基因组学、生物学和科学研究中的表现。
stories.analysis: AI在生命科学领域的应用评估标准化，有助于推动精准医疗。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro：生命科学评测方法论
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: 该新闻深入介绍 GeneBench-Pro 的设计，展示其如何评估AI在生命科学中的能力。
stories.analysis: 深入了解测评细节有助于开发者优化模型在生物学任务上的表现。

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 发布定制AI芯片Jalapeño，专为LLM推理优化
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
stories.summary: OpenAI和Broadcom联合发布Jalapeño，一款面向大模型推理的定制芯片，旨在提升性能、效率和规模化部署能力。
stories.analysis: 定制芯片降低推理成本，是AI服务商业化的关键一步。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

stories.title: OpenAI 启动 Patch the Planet，用AI支持开源维护者修复漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
stories.summary: OpenAI 旗下 Daybreak 发起 Patch the Planet 计划，利用AI和专家审核帮助开源维护者发现、验证和修复漏洞。
stories.analysis: AI赋能开源安全生态，维护者获得更高效的漏洞修复工具。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

stories.title: Google 在弗吉尼亚投资社区与能源项目，支撑AI数据中心扩张
stories.sourceTitle: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
stories.summary: Google宣布在弗吉尼亚州进行新社区投资，帮助建设下一代劳动力和扩大能源可负担性项目，与数据中心和AI基础设施扩张相关。
stories.analysis: 数据中心扩张需要与当地社区和能源规划协调，否则可能引发阻力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

stories.title: OpenAI 推理模型助力医生诊断儿童罕见遗传病，新发现18个病例
stories.sourceTitle: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
stories.summary: 研究人员利用 OpenAI 的推理模型处理复杂医学信息，在既往未解决的病例中识别出18种新诊断，辅助医生诊断儿童罕见病。
stories.analysis: AI在罕见病诊断中展示了潜力，可缩短诊断时间、提高准确率。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

stories.title: BBVA 将 ChatGPT Enterprise 部署至10万员工，与OpenAI深化银行AI化
stories.sourceTitle: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
stories.summary: BBVA（西班牙对外银行）已向10万员工推广ChatGPT Enterprise，并与OpenAI合作加速全球AI银行转型。
stories.analysis: 大型银行大规模部署AI助手，改变员工工作方式和客户服务。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

stories.title: 可通过 Oracle 云承诺使用 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
stories.sourceTitle: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
stories.summary: OpenAI 与 Oracle 合作，允许用户通过现有的 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，并具备企业级安全与治理能力。
stories.analysis: 多云策略使企业客户更灵活地部署AI，降低锁定风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

stories.title: OpenAI 获政府许可后公开发布 GPT-5.6，同时推出“ChatGPT Work”
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
stories.summary: OpenAI 在完成有限预览后获得特朗普政府批准，面向公众发布GPT-5.6，并同时宣布推出“ChatGPT Work”产品。
stories.analysis: 模型审批和商业化进程受政府监管影响，政企合作模式成为关键。
stories.sourceExcerpt: About two weeks after OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama - rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a "limited preview" period - the company has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of the model

stories.title: 百度搭子日均提问量暴增20倍，发布企业版
stories.sourceTitle: 日均提问次数暴增 20 倍！百度搭子宣布重磅升级，企业版同步发布
stories.summary: 百度旗下AI助手“搭子”宣布重大升级，日均提问次数增长20倍，并同步推出企业版。
stories.analysis: 中国AI产品用户增长迅速，企业版瞄准办公场景。
stories.sourceExcerpt: agent时代来了

stories.title: 蚂蚁灵波发布 LingBot-VA 2.0，具身智能从零预训练
stories.sourceTitle: 从零开始预训练，蚂蚁灵波发布具身原生世界动作模型LingBot-VA 2.0
stories.summary: 蚂蚁集团旗下灵波团队发布具身原生世界动作模型LingBot-VA 2.0，该模型从零开始预训练，旨在提升机器人动作理解与执行能力。
stories.analysis: 具身智能领域竞争加剧，预训练模型有望加速机器人落地。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：Qwen 家族首个实时安全护栏模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 团队推出 Qwen3Guard，这是 Qwen 家族的第一个安全护栏模型，基于 Qwen3 微调，专用于实时分类Token流的安全性，支持安全评估。
stories.analysis: 大模型安全防护成为刚需，开源护栏模型有助于社区构建更安全的AI应用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
